notes:
The three Camp Sweetgum counselors, summer of 1994.  Author registers vary: Jenny Copeland is Marc Ostrom; Bear Roland is Marc Ostrom; Wilson Ashe is Ines Rocha (her design, her dialogue, the character she is proudest of in her whole career per the 2019 podcast).

Counselors follow the same schedule-driven placement as campers, but their schedule is authored per-counselor rather than derived from generic bunk_pos.  Each has a mess_hall_seat and positions in the zones they oversee (archery range for Bear, various for Jenny, mess hall + campfire ring for Wilson).

counselors.hello_line: Sam.  Welcome to Camp Sweetgum.  I've been coming here since I was ten.  You're going to be fine.  You're going to be more than fine.
counselors.notes: Head counselor.  Twenty-four.  Came here as a camper in 1980.  Warm, sensible, unflappable.  In Mrs. Wu's Garden she reappears as an adult, unnamed at first.
counselors.portrait_palette_hint: warm ochre · a long braid over one shoulder · a whistle on a red lanyard · a Camp Sweetgum staff t-shirt

counselors.hello_line: Sam.  I got a striped bass off the dock at 5:40 this morning.  It jumped clear out of the water.  I put it back.  I have theories about why it jumped.
counselors.notes: Outdoors counselor.  Twenty-six, unmarried, lives in Corvallis.  Fishes before breakfast.  Teaches archery, kayaking, ropes course.  Catches Ollie on Thursday.
counselors.portrait_palette_hint: sunbleached tan · dark brown beard · a red plaid shirt with the sleeves rolled · a fisherman's cap

counselors.hello_line: Sam.  Good morning.  How are you today.  I'm glad you're here.  ...I have to go check on something in the boathouse.
counselors.notes:
New counselor this year.  Thirty-one.  Tall.  Quiet.  A canvas bag he does not put down.  Design doc §Wilson Ashe mystery · six clues.  Six of six unlock the Wilson ending in Wave M.

Rocha's dialogue register · sentences that end on the observation, not the assessment.  Wilson does not offer opinions.  He offers noticings.
counselors.portrait_palette_hint: cool sepia · dark hair · a thin scar on his left cheekbone · a canvas duffel bag over his shoulder · quiet eyes
